creator: dave@dogwood.com
text:
The sequence was this - I had a build from nov 1st that worked fine.  around
nov 6, i built a new image which failed, but didn't have time to dig deeper.
 on nov 24th I built again and this also failed.  then, on the nov 24th
build i copied over hostapd from the nov 1st build and this got things
working for me again.  this seems to point at the problem happening between
nov 1st & ~6th.

I also realized that I did not describe the environment - I am compiling on
an i386 system (under Vmware) and then assembling the binaries and compiling
a new kernel to build the image for an ALIX board using a Geode chip.

there was a significant update made to hostapd on nov 3rd, and i'm betting
whatever happened happened there.

from the -net mailing list, it sounds like Adrian Chadd and Rui had some
idea of what the problem might be here.
